task: Launch-quality advanced task: Robot Camera-Hand Calibration Covariance Review. Reality context: a robotic assembly cell misses placements after camera replacement. Embedded packet: metric map: metric1=reprojection_error_px, metric2=pose_spread_mm, metric3=target_count, metric4=pick_error_mm; records: R1 reprojection_error_px=10.93 pose_spread_mm=55.72 target_count=523 pick_error_mm=44.71; R2 reprojection_error_px=36.79 pose_spread_mm=35.76 target_count=676 pick_error_mm=62.9; R3 reprojection_error_px=11.61 pose_spread_mm=78.83 target_count=404 pick_error_mm=70.28; R4 reprojection_error_px=72.21 pose_spread_mm=30.97 target_count=617 pick_error_mm=17.32; limit_reprojection_error_px=22.31; limit_pose_spread_mm=59.8; limit_target_count=322; decision_budget_usd=227500; sensitivity_shift_pct=5; hard_threshold_record_count=1; removed_context="career posting emphasized judgment under ambiguous production evidence". Rules and constraints: Compute normalized risk = metric1/limit1 + metric2/limit2 + 0.5*metric3/limit3 - 0.4*metric4/limit4; fail if risk>1.15, warn if 0.95-1.15, pass otherwise. Options or recommendations cannot use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet, and any contradictory or under-supported record must be marked needs_review. Required work: decide whether calibration is production-ready; calculate derived metrics, classify every record, identify the smallest defensible intervention, and write the decision rationale. Deliver camera_hand_covariance.xlsx + calibration_decision.md with formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
